skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
4, 4, 7, 7, 7, 9, 18

Which of the following lists represents a data set that has the same mean and the same median as the data set above?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The given data set has mean (4+4+7+7+7+9+18) ÷ 7 = 56 ÷ 7 = 8 and median 7. The data set 5, 5, 7, 7, 7, 8, 17 has sum 56, so its mean is 8, and its middle value (when ordered) is 7.

Choice A is incorrect. This data set has mean 8 but median 8, not 7.

Choice B is incorrect. This data set has median 7 but mean 50/7 ≈ 7.14, not 8.

Choice D is incorrect. This data set has neither the same mean nor the same median.
